name: Polda
short_description: Pancras is a neurotic cop investigating a case of mysterious kidnapping in the town of Lupany. Help him find out, who’s behind the abduction of two orderly citizens!
detailed_description:
Investigate a mysterious kidnapping in the town of Lupany in this classic point and click old school adventure game. You got your uniform and your gun and you’re certainly no angel, so you take the law into your own hands. This detective parody full of comedy is fully dubbed in English. The game features loads of characters, an unusual amount of details, detailed animations, logical plot twists, more than 250 quality sound effects, a story full of authentic and peculiar humour…

  • 45 interactive characters
  • 35 game locations in different settings
  • outstanding and stylish graphic design
  • lots of game items
  • interesting detective plot
  • logical puzzle tasks
  • quality music and sound effects
